title: agastache foeniculum
intro: Agastache foeniculum, also known as Purple Giant Hyssop or Bergamot Mint, is a perennial herb native to North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties that help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Agastache foeniculum include relieving symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing stress. Herbal preparations of Agastache foeniculum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicine in the form of capsules, tablets, or topical creams.
